description:
🕒 17:00–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-morimana-satoyamakontyu/

Summer break! Nature! Free research project! But how do you actually do research? Work through your summer homework and free research project together with Morimana staff! Everyone interested in living things and research is welcome. You'll set various traps to catch insects, make insect specimens, and work together to create survey maps. Take a step into unknown exploration in the rich environment of the satoyama (foothill farmland)!

【Fee】Adults ¥8,000 | Students ¥6,000 | Preschoolers ¥4,000 (includes guide, insurance, materials)

【Capacity】15 people

【Guide】Mori no Field Gakusha (Forest Field Study House) staff

【What to bring】Drinks, flashlight, rain gear, gloves, insect repellent spray, insect net, lunch (Day 2)

【Note】Forest Field Study House website: https://morinomanabiya168.wixsite.com/website
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分
summary: Summer Free Research in the Satoyama: Learn Where Insects Live Using Traps!
